_comment: IFR ATC response templates — Eurocontrol ICAO English phraseology. Merged with eu/vfr/atc_templates.json at load time; keys here extend (never override) VFR entries. Phase 4, Slice 1+2: Delivery clearance + startup + Tower departure flow.

IDLE._comment_ifr: IFR clearance controller resolved via {clearance_controller} (Delivery when freq exists, Tower otherwise). _TOWER_ONLY variant kept for explicit tower-only routing.

REQUEST_IFR_CLEARANCE.response: {callsign}, {airport} {clearance_controller}, cleared to {ifr_destination} as filed via {ifr_sid_phrase}, initial climb to {ifr_initial_altitude}{ifr_departure_constraint}, squawk {squawk}, QNH {qnh}{atis_tail}.

REQUEST_IFR_CLEARANCE_TOWER_ONLY.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, cleared to {ifr_destination} as filed via {ifr_sid_phrase}, initial climb to {ifr_initial_altitude}{ifr_departure_constraint}, squawk {squawk}, QNH {qnh}{atis_tail}.

READBACK._comment: Pilot confirmed ATIS but forgot to re-state the IFR request. Guide them.
READBACK.response: {callsign}, re-state IFR clearance request with information {atis_letter} and destination.

_INVALID.response: {callsign}, say again, state IFR clearance request including information letter and destination.

IFR/PREDEP_CLEARANCE._comment: Clearance issued. ATC waits for full readback before approving startup.

_INVALID.response: {callsign}, read back IFR clearance in full.

IFR/CLEARED._comment: Startup approved. Pilot may request taxi or call Ground/Tower. QNH already given in IFR clearance — omitted here.

REQUEST_STARTUP.response: {callsign}, startup approved, call when ready to taxi.

_INVALID.response: {callsign}, startup approved, request taxi when ready.

TAXI_CLEARED._comment: IFR override: pilot reports at holding point. Routes to Tower, same as READY_FOR_DEPARTURE but without requiring the word 'ready'.

GROUND_CONTACT._comment_ifr: Pilot already exchanged initial call but hasn't yet requested IFR clearance (e.g. called Ground, got position check, then called 'request IFR clearance'). Mirror the IDLE handler so the clearance is issued regardless of which state the system is in after the initial call.

REQUEST_IFR_CLEARANCE.response: {callsign}, {airport} {clearance_controller}, cleared to {ifr_destination} as filed via {ifr_sid_phrase}, initial climb to {ifr_initial_altitude}{ifr_departure_constraint}, squawk {squawk}, QNH {qnh}{atis_tail}.

REQUEST_IFR_CLEARANCE_TOWER_ONLY.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, cleared to {ifr_destination} as filed via {ifr_sid_phrase}, initial climb to {ifr_initial_altitude}{ifr_departure_constraint}, squawk {squawk}, QNH {qnh}{atis_tail}.

TOWER_CONTACT._comment_ifr: IFR clearance may arrive after the two-step 'go ahead' flow. Handle it here before the VFR TOWER_CONTACT template sees it.

REQUEST_IFR_CLEARANCE.response: {callsign}, {airport} {clearance_controller}, cleared to {ifr_destination} as filed via {ifr_sid_phrase}, initial climb to {ifr_initial_altitude}{ifr_departure_constraint}, squawk {squawk}, QNH {qnh}{atis_tail}.

REQUEST_IFR_CLEARANCE_TOWER_ONLY.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, cleared to {ifr_destination} as filed via {ifr_sid_phrase}, initial climb to {ifr_initial_altitude}{ifr_departure_constraint}, squawk {squawk}, QNH {qnh}{atis_tail}.

IFR/TOWER_CONTACT._comment: Virtual state: reached when TOWER_CONTACT + departure/holding intent + IFR squawk assigned. Issues line-up-and-wait for an orderly IFR departure.

IFR/LINE_UP_AND_WAIT._comment: Pilot has lined up. Awaiting readback then ready call to issue takeoff clearance.

_INVALID.response: {callsign}, line up and wait runway {runway}, acknowledge.

IFR/LINE_UP_AND_WAIT_READY._comment: Virtual state: pilot says ready after lining up. Issues takeoff clearance.

IFR/DEPARTURE_CLEARED._comment: Takeoff clearance issued. Readback is silent — frequency handoff fires only via poll_departure_handoff when the aircraft exits the CTR.

IFR/FREQ_HANDOFF._comment: Tower has issued the Departure/Approach frequency. Pilot reads it back then switches.

IFR/EN_ROUTE._comment: On Departure frequency, pilot not yet checked in. poll_departure_handoff() issued the handoff.

IFR/ENROUTE_CRUISE._comment: On Centre frequency. Pilot checks in; poll_enroute() issues direct-to, then descent + Approach handoff.

IFR/APPROACH_CONTACT_READBACK._comment: Pilot read back 'contact Approach on X.XXX' while still on Centre frequency. Stay in APPROACH_CONTACT until pilot switches and calls again.

IFR/APPROACH_CONTACT._comment: Centre has handed off; pilot switches to Approach and checks in.

IFR/APPROACH_DESCENT._comment: Approach monitoring STAR step-down constraints. Poll-driven clearances only; pilot-initiated intents handled here.

IFR/GROUND_NO_CLEARANCE._comment: Pilot requested taxi before receiving IFR clearance. Ground redirects to request clearance first. next_state=GROUND_CONTACT so the pilot can immediately request clearance.

REQUEST_TAXI.response: {callsign}, {airport} {clearance_controller}, clearance not received, request IFR clearance.

IFR/APPROACH_TOWER_READBACK._comment: Pilot read back 'contact Tower, report established' while still on Approach freq. Stay in APPROACH_TOWER until pilot switches to Tower and calls again.

IFR/APPROACH_TOWER._comment: Pilot switched to Tower after 'contact Tower, report established'. Tower gives landing clearance on check-in.

IFR/RADAR_CONTACT._comment: Pilot checked in with Departure. ATC issues SID step climbs and direct-to shortcuts via poll_sid_climb().

TRAFFIC_DIALOG._comment: IFR-specific side-channel entries merged into VFR TRAFFIC_DIALOG. readback_cancel_ifr replaces the VFR 'clearance cancelled, contact tower' message when readback times out during IFR en-route or approach phases.
